Lac-d..personality: A deeply chilly, exhausted individual who appears careworn and in decline, unable to endure exertion of any kind. They are listless, averse to mental work, and prefer complete rest in dark, quiet surroundings, withdrawing from social contact and conversation.
Lac-d..mental_state: Marked by loss of memory, mental vacillation, and an inability to concentrate or sustain intellectual effort. There is a fixed conviction of impending death, with claustrophobic anxiety and vertigo triggered by simple movements such as turning in bed or raising the hands.
Lac-d..emotional_pattern: Profound sadness pervades, with active desire for death and contemplation of the easiest means of self-destruction. There is a strong aversion to seeing or talking to people, weeping with palpitation, and morbid imaginings that all loved ones will die, driving fantasies of complete withdrawal from the world.
